v9.0.249.title: Data Awareness Filter
v9.0.249.description: Stop asking for age/gestation/BP when already documented in the note
relatedFeedback: IVecsVQIPnaPEg2cFyiY: why is it asking for gestational age when it's right there at the top as 32+4
2WzE4ElzGeHa0P1iZ600: why is it asking for the patient's age, when it says 28yo?
spE6nFMSxmW4clntuNJ4: when we've said 'vital signs within normal limits' this should cover BP

implementation.description: Added regex-based data awareness filter that checks if suggested information is already documented before prompting

testPlan: Manual: Create note with '28yo, 32+4 weeks, vital signs normal' - should NOT ask for age/gestation/BP
Agentic: Run test with multiple scenarios - track if 'Patient age' or 'Gestational age' suggestions appear
Console: Look for [FILTER] messages showing items being skipped
